feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Quantum fluctuations and the emergence of in-gap Higgs mode in superconductors
entry.content:
Authors: S Tian, N Tsuji, D Manske -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.15120, 2026

Abstract: We extend the well-established action of the Higgs mode in $s$-wave superconductors to include quantum fluctuations (QFs). We find that already one-loop quantum corrections to the Higgs propagator shift its eigenfrequency below the ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Nontrivial Topological Magnon States in Skyrmionium Lattices with Zero Topological Charge
entry.content:
Authors: X Zheng, P Tang, X Liu, Z Li, P Yan, H Wu -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.13451, 2026

Abstract: We predict the emergence of nontrivial topological magnon states in the skyrmionium lattice with zero topological charge. We propose the concept of weighted magnetic flux, which provides a clear physical picture for this anomalous ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Open Chemical Reaction Network Thermodynamics within Closed Systems
entry.content:
Authors: B Remlein, M Esposito, F Avanzini -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.14848, 2026

Abstract: ... We now turn to closed CRNs and introduce the fundamental framework that enable the emergence of open-CRN behavior. To this end, ... the emergence of open-CRN dynamics. In Subs. VI B, we show that imposing abundance separation ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Time Semicrystals in Holographic Driven-Dissipative Systems
entry.content:
Authors: YQ Lei, XH Ge, Y Tian, SF Wu -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.14131, 2026

Abstract: Understanding how temporal order degrades in quantum systems remains a central issue in nonequilibrium physics. Here we study the melting of discrete time crystals in a periodically driven holographic system, where a distinct (discrete) time ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: CAMO: An Agentic Framework for Automated Causal Discovery from Micro Behaviors to Macro Emergence in LLM Agent Simulations
entry.content:
Authors: X Yu, Y Guo, Y Hou, X Xue, Q Ma -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.14691, 2026

Abstract: LLM-empowered agent simulations are increasingly used to study social emergence , yet the micro-to-macro causal mechanisms behind macro outcomes often remain unclear. This is challenging because emergence arises from intertwined agent ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Operator Space Transport and the Emergence of Boundary Time Crystals
entry.content:
Authors: D Nemeth, A Nazir, RJ Slager, A Principi -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.14291, 2026

Abstract: Boundary time crystals (BTCs) are prominent examples of continuous time crystals in collective spin systems governed by Lindbladian evolution. To date, their analysis has mostly relied on semiclassical and numerical approaches. Here, we develop a ...
